message:
test(tui): add stress/performance test suite (bd-xzt.4.5)

24 stress tests covering:
- Sustained tick processing (1000 ticks), all-screen tick cycles
- Large telemetry payloads (1000 events, 500 candidates, 300 decisions, 50 volumes)
- Bursty data arrivals (20 bursts of 50 events, 10 candidate refreshes)
- Intermittent adapter failures (200 alternating updates, 100 sustained failures)
- Frame metrics accumulation under load (200 pushes into 60-capacity ring buffer)
- Render budget assertions across all screens with loaded data
- Memory stability: rate history pruning, notification eviction, ring buffer bounds
- Rapid screen cycling (500 navigations), overlay toggling (200 cycles)
- Resize stress under data load (200 resize+tick pairs)
- Combined realistic session (50 rounds with telemetry, navigation, errors)
- Deterministic replay verification (identical trace digests)
- Structured ArtifactCollector performance bundle for trend tracking

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
